sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83776" key="plhqo/xoros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πληθό-χορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much-dancing,</tr_> or, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gathering a large troupe of dancers,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
